scripts.build:release: node ./scripts/prepare-release.mjs && pnpm prepare:python-runtime && pnpm build:next && pnpm compile && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --signed --mac
scripts.build: pnpm prepare:python-runtime && pnpm build:next && pnpm compile && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs
scripts.build:mac: pnpm prepare:python-runtime && pnpm build:next && pnpm compile && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac
scripts.build:dir: pnpm prepare:python-runtime && pnpm build:next && pnpm compile && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --dir
